nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: SQL setup script for the Nexmark benchmark that creates streaming sources for bids, auctions, and persons tables used in simulation tests.

nodes.name: q101.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 101 implementing a streaming materialized view over nexmark source data.

nodes.name: q102.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 102, a streaming aggregation over auction/bid data for testing simulation infrastructure.

nodes.name: q103.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 103, testing a windowed join or filter over nexmark event streams.

nodes.name: q104.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 104, verifying streaming query correctness with multi-stream operations.

nodes.name: q105.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 105 testing a streaming window aggregation pattern.

nodes.name: q106.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 106 covering a more complex multi-stream operation used in scale tests.

nodes.name: q107_eowc.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query 107 using end-of-window commit (EOWC) semantics for testing append-only streaming outputs.

nodes.name: q15.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q15 (Bidding Statistics by Seller) used to test streaming aggregation in simulation.

nodes.name: q18.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q18 (Find Last Bid) testing TOP-N and deduplication patterns in streaming simulation.

nodes.name: q3.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q3 (Local Item Suggestion) testing streaming join between auctions and persons.

nodes.name: q4.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q4 (Average Price for a Category) testing streaming join and aggregation.

nodes.name: q5.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q5 (Hot Items) using a sliding window aggregation to find highest-bid items.

nodes.name: q5_eowc.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q5 variant using end-of-window commit (EOWC) semantics for append-only output.

nodes.name: q7.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q7 (Highest Bid) finding the top bid per auction window in streaming mode.

nodes.name: q7_eowc.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q7 variant using end-of-window commit (EOWC) semantics.

nodes.name: q8.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q8 (Monitor New Users) testing a window join between auctions and persons in streaming simulation.

nodes.name: q9.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark simulation benchmark query Q9 (Winning Bids) joining auctions and bids to find the winning bid per auction.
